description: Large language models, image generation, AI research breakthroughs, model releases and benchmarks
negative_examples: App using AI API without model innovation (-> tech-products)
Government AI regulation or policy (-> macro-policy)

description: IDEs, frameworks, libraries, DevOps tools, programming languages, developer productivity
negative_examples: Consumer app that happens to use a framework (-> tech-products)
Security vulnerability in a dev tool (-> security)

description: Consumer electronics, apps, platforms, product launches, hardware releases
negative_examples: Developer SDK or API release (-> dev-tools)

description: Startups, funding, acquisitions, corporate strategy, market competition
negative_examples: Stock price movement without business context (-> finance)

description: Stock markets, crypto, fintech, banking, investment trends
Government regulations, tech policy, antitrust, data privacy laws, trade policy
Global tech landscape, cross-border developments, geopolitics affecting tech
Cybersecurity, vulnerabilities, data breaches, privacy incidents, security tools
negative_examples: Privacy policy update by company (-> macro-policy)
Security tool new feature release (-> dev-tools)

description: Open source projects, community developments, license changes, major releases
negative_examples: Commercial product with open API (-> tech-products)
Using open source in proprietary product (-> tech-products)

description: Game releases, gaming industry, esports, game development, gaming platforms
negative_examples: Game engine used for non-game purpose (-> dev-tools)

description: Scientific discoveries, research papers, space exploration, biotech, climate
negative_examples: Applied AI product using research (-> ai-models or tech-products)

description: High-impact breaking news across any category, major incidents, urgent developments
negative_examples: Routine product update even if from major company (-> appropriate category)
Scheduled event or conference announcement (-> appropriate category)
Follow-up coverage of yesterday's breaking news (-> appropriate category)
